summary: Frontend-only test of two new features: 'Pub Crawls & more' mode and 'Check in here' button. All 6 requested test scenarios PASS. Crawl toggle, mutual exclusivity with Group mode, Deal button labels ('Deal Your Fate!' / 'Deal 3 Fates!' / 'Deal a Crawl!'), direct dialog open (no shuffle animation), 6 stops rendered with reshuffle/drop/share, dialog closes via ESC, and check-in-button rendered on single-mode fate reveal alongside Shuffle again / Share your fate / Clear all verified. Mobile 390x844 pass on crawl dialog confirms it opens with 6 stops and is scrollable.

issues: Bottom action row (Shuffle a new crawl / Share crawl) does not wrap on narrow viewports — 'Share crawl' button overflows the right edge of the dialog and is partially clipped. `flex-1` on the shuffle button plus min-content share button doesn't collapse; consider giving both buttons `flex-1 basis-full sm:basis-auto` or `flex-col sm:flex-row` so they stack under 640px.
Radix accessibility warning in console: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Add a <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to satisfy Radix a11y.

action_items: (Low) Make PubCrawlDialog footer buttons wrap/stack on mobile so 'Share crawl' isn't clipped at ≤390px.
(Low) Add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to PubCrawlDialog to silence Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: PubCrawlDialog.jsx: reshuffle() runs on every `results` prop change via useEffect deps — fine, but note that opening the dialog with same results still reshuffles because `open` toggles; acceptable UX.
CheckInButton.jsx: gracefully falls back to clipboard when navigator.share is unavailable — verified by monkey-patching share=undefined and clicking; no errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Places live search is capped at 160/day — this run used only 3 Deal clicks (2 crawl + 1 single). Both new features work end-to-end with ZIP 10001. Only cosmetic/a11y polish items remain.
